The drawing is
the easy part.

Belair Builders makes architecturally designed homes and renovations real across Melbourne's inner east — the tricky details, the tight sites, the joinery that has to be perfect. Handed a drawing, we return a home that outlasts the people who commissioned it.

Years on the tools
Who we are

A builder that reads plans the way architects draw them.

Most homes are built close enough to the drawing. Ours are built to it — the shadow lines land, the levels run true, and the parts you can't see are done as carefully as the parts you can.

Belair Builders specialise in the construction of complex, architecturally designed residential homes and renovations across Melbourne — with much of our work in the inner-eastern suburbs of Hawthorn, Kew, Camberwell, Balwyn and the wider Boroondara area. It's a highly specialised field, and it's the only work we do.

Our expertise lies in working closely with architects, interior designers and clients — delivering the outcome everyone set out to achieve. That collaboration is where the difference shows: fewer surprises on site, and a finished home that matches the intent it started with. On period homes and sites under a heritage overlay, that early, careful approach matters even more.

Established in 1990, we're a custom home builder Melbourne owners trust with their most demanding projects — passionate about what we do and proud to deliver to the highest quality possible. We'd be glad to be part of your residential project, and this is a look at the work that speaks for us.

Team, drawing to handover
What we take on

Work that rewards being done properly.

Three kinds of project where a careful builder makes all the difference.

01

New architectural homes

Ground-up custom homes built from detailed architectural documentation, where structure, finish and the ideas behind them all have to hold together.

02

Renovations & extensions

Additions and reworks to existing Melbourne homes — including period properties and heritage-overlay sites that demand judgement, problem-solving and respect for what's already there.

03

Fine detail & joinery

The bespoke, made-to-measure work that separates a good build from a great one. Cabinetry, stairs, and the details people run their hands along.

Selected work

Homes we're glad to put our name to.

A closer look at what we build — architecturally designed homes and renovations across Melbourne's inner-eastern suburbs.

How we work

No surprises. That's the whole promise.

A build should feel like a straight line, even when the work isn't. Here's the shape of ours.

STEP 01

Sit down early

We come in while the drawings are still warm, so buildability and budget are part of the conversation — not a shock later.

STEP 02

Price it honestly

A clear, detailed cost you can trust, with the assumptions spelled out. No vague allowances that balloon on site.

STEP 03

Build it right

One accountable team on site, tidy trades, and regular updates so you always know exactly where things stand.

STEP 04

Hand it over

A finished home that matches the drawings, and a builder who's still there if you need anything after the keys change hands.

Start a project

Have a set of plans? Let's talk.

Whether it's a fresh design or a renovation you've been sitting on, the earliest conversation is the most useful one. Bring us the drawings — or just the idea.
